mnemonics: STAMP: Standard Templates Accelerate Mainstream Processes
A template is a COOKIE CUTTER for contracts: Consistent, One-click, Out-of-the-box, Known, Efficient, Easy, Reusable
keyPoints: Templates provide pre-written, reusable code for common contract functions (e.g., ERC-20 tokens, NFT minting).
They significantly reduce development time and lower the risk of introducing vulnerabilities.
Templates are often created and audited by the community, providing a trusted foundation for dApp development.
commonMistakes: Assuming a template is completely secure and not getting an independent audit for a specific use case.
Failing to properly customize a template, leaving placeholder data or incorrect permissions active.
Using an outdated or unmaintained template version that may contain known vulnerabilities.
